mapper.select: SELECT id, provider, provider_id, email, nickname, profile_image_url, role, created_at, updated_at, deleted_at, suspended_from, suspended_until FROM users WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted_at IS NULL
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO users (provider, provider_id, email, nickname, profile_image_url, role) VALUES (#{provider}, #{providerId}, #{email}, #{nickname}, #{profileImageUrl}, #{role})
